name: justin-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Justin Nguyen

plugins.name: notion-life
plugins.description: Personal daily goal tracker and life management plugin for Notion. Log activities, track streaks, record PRs, save tech notes, and get proactive insights.

plugins.name: code-documenter
plugins.description: Generate and maintain documentation for codebases — inline comments, architecture docs, internal guides, and external references. Supports output to docs/ folder or Notion.

plugins.name: db-schema-designer
plugins.description: Design, improve, and convert relational database schemas for PostgreSQL and MySQL. Applies normalization rules (1NF-3NF), enforces naming conventions, and supports SQL, DBML, Prisma, TypeORM, and Sequelize formats.

plugins.name: mentor-mode
plugins.description: A coaching companion that gives hints, leading questions, and authoritative doc links instead of generating code — for when you want to learn, not delegate. Includes /guide, /hint, /evaluate, /find-docs, and /mentor-on session-wide enforcement via a UserPromptSubmit hook.
